assertion_results.text: Output maps ValidationError to 400 Bad Request
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'it maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request' for ValidationError

assertion_results.text: Output maps InvalidDataError to 422 Unprocessable Entity
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'it maps to HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity' for InvalidDataError

assertion_results.text: Output states ValidationError belongs in application or infrastructure layers
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'used in the application or infrastructure layers when incoming request data fails basic structural validation'

assertion_results.text: Output states InvalidDataError belongs in domain entities, value objects, or builders
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'used in domain entities, value objects, and builders when business invariants or domain validations fail'

assertion_results.text: Output clearly distinguishes the two errors by layer and purpose
assertion_results.evidence: Answer explicitly contrasts the two errors: ValidationError=structural/DTO validation in app/infra layers (400), InvalidDataError=domain business rules in domain layer (422)
